hero_sub: Expert cuts, colour, extensions, makeup and skin treatments tailored for Durham locals

services.title: Women's Haircut
services.body: Consultation, cut, and finish to suit your style and hair texture

services.title: Balayage Colour
services.body: Hand-painted highlights blended for natural, sun-kissed dimension without harsh lines

services.title: Classic Manicure
services.body: Nail shaping, cuticle care, polish application, and hand massage for smooth finish

about: Harrison's Hair & Beauty offers haircuts, colouring and beauty treatments in Durham. Clients rate the salon 4.9 stars on Google based on 66 reviews

faq.q: What area does Harrison's Hair & Beauty serve?
faq.a: We are based in Durham and welcome clients from the surrounding local area

faq.q: How can I book an appointment?
faq.a: Book by emailing 83emmaharrison@gmail.com; we will confirm your slot

faq.q: What can I expect during my visit?
faq.a: You will receive a personal consultation, a haircut or styling, and a finishing touch; the stylist will explain each step
